Metal_Spear.description: An iron spearhead, improving defensive power and range.
Metal_Spear.flavorText: \'I throw a spear into the darkness. That is intuition. Then I must send an army into the darkness to find the spear. That is intellect.\' -- Ingmar Bergman

Metal_Ore.description: Natural iron ore of high purity, easily smelted.
Metal_Ore.flavorText: Iron ore is plentiful in the planetary crust, as on Earth. Requires the high temperatures of a furnace to refine into pure ingots.

Metal_Knife.description: A short, clip-point blade for better defense and swifter skinning.
Metal_Knife.flavorText: \'A mind all logic is like a knife all blade. It makes the hand bleed that uses it.\' -- Rabindranath Tagore

Metal_Axe.description: An iron axe, for swifter felling and hewing.
Metal_Axe.flavorText: \'Technological progress is like an axe in the hands of a pathological criminal.\' -- Albert Einstein

Metal_Pickaxe.description: A strong iron pickaxe, for more rapid, reliable mining of basic stone.
Metal_Pickaxe.flavorText: An enduring if ironic icon of the so-called \'Exotics Rush\'.

Metal_Bolt.description: A hard-hitting iron bolt, trading distance for damage.
Metal_Bolt.flavorText: Roughly 64,000 years since its first invention, the essential form of the bolt remains unchanged.

Machete.description: A heavy duty blade, highly durable but less suitable for skinning.

MetaResource.description: Exotic matter, an impossibility in your hands. Use an Orbital Exchange Interface to send to orbit.
MetaResource.flavorText: Previously believed to exist only in the heart of stars, the most common form of exotics, elanthium, has permitted extraordinary leaps in low temperature super conductors and high-density power storage.

Molotov.flavorText: Homemade explosives are the best kind.

Material_Processor.description: Swiftly craft advanced ingredients and resources.

Meta_Axe.description: A mass-produced, but unremarkable hewing tool.
Meta_Axe.flavorText: Xigo specialises in high-end look at a low-end price.

Meta_Pickaxe.description: A fancy name for a fairly ordinary mining device.
Meta_Pickaxe.flavorText: There\'s a joke: "Where Xigo goes, humanity is never far behind."

Meta_Knife.description: A low grade, serviceable knife from \'the Purveyor of Everything\'
Meta_Knife.flavorText: Whatever you kill with this blade doesn\'t need to know how little you paid.

Module_Player_Tracker.description: Provides realtime location data on team members.
Module_Player_Tracker.flavorText: Equip in a module slot to view your team members on the map.

Metal_Oxite_Dissolver.description: A faster and more efficient, biofuel-powered oxidizer with greater storage.

Metal_Ladder.description: A sturdy metal ladder for climbing.

Masonry_Bench.description: Tools for working and shaping stone.
Masonry_Bench.flavorText: The art of stonework is untouched by the distance between worlds.

Mammoth_Tusk.description: A fortune in ivory from a titan reborn; a small step towards revealing Icarus\'s secrets.
Mammoth_Tusk.flavorText: Theories suggest that when exotic material present in plant life is ingested, it affects cellular reproduction in animals. The exact mechanism is unclear, with speculation that some varieties of exotics possess negative mass, producing relativistic micro-effects. Analysis of this specimen will reveal more.

Mission_Sonic_Disrupter.description: An experimental device for projecting densely clustered micro-shockwaves in a gas medium.
Mission_Sonic_Disrupter.flavorText: A product of collaborative research between Group 15 and one of Larkwell Martinez\'s non-lethal weapons research units.

Meta_Ration.flavorText: For those with more pressing concerns than what their food actually tastes like, Agrizero\'s MREs provide enduring sustenance.

Meta_Super_Ration.description: Protein- and energy- boosted high-density food product.
Meta_Super_Ration.flavorText: Agrizero\'s \'Eat and forget\' campaign never truly hit home, suggesting the food was either immemorable or best wiped from one\'s memory. Regardless, the product provides a huge amount of nutrition in a small space.

Meta_Oxygen_Gel.description: Agrizero\'s patented gel supplement lowers the heart rate, reducing oxygen consumption.
Meta_Oxygen_Gel.flavorText: Largely illegal on Earth, indispensible among the stars.

Meta_Stamina_Gel.description: A blend of natural ingredients and highly synthetic stimulants that temporarily slows stamina loss.

Meta_Module_PlayerTracker.description: Provides realtime location data on team members.
Meta_Module_PlayerTracker.flavorText: Equip in a module slot to view your team members on the map.

Meta_Module_Movement.flavorText: Experiments by Larkwell Martinez into the gravitational effects of exotics have resulted in a prototype known as the \'Dampener\', which slightly lowers local mass, allowing swifter movement.

Meta_Module_Carry_Weight.description: Electro-active device that \'hijacks\' metallic envirosuit fibers to create a \'virtual exoskeleton\' that enhances carry capacity.
Meta_Module_Carry_Weight.flavorText: Electro-active shape-memory fibers are highly flexible under normal conditions, but become rigid when exposed to an electric charge.

Meta_Module_Poison_Resistance.description: Releases a steady micro dose of antivenom, enhancing poison resistance.
Meta_Module_Poison_Resistance.flavorText: The Detoxifier is classified under UDA regulations as technically qualifying users as a cyborg.

Meta_Module_Fire_Resistance.description: Improves fire resistance by harnessing exotics\' quasi-negative mass to create a nonlinear energy sink.
Meta_Module_Fire_Resistance.flavorText: The sudden abundance of exotic matter produced an immense range of technological innovation in an exceedingly short time, resulting in an era for which the world \'renaissance\' is barely adequate.

Meta_Module_Consumption.description: Micro-doses the user with a high-potency enzyme supplement to reduce food, water and oxygen consumption.
Meta_Module_Consumption.flavorText: "Like terraforming for your body." - Anonymous Group 15 researcher

Meta_Module_Fall_Damage.description: Drastic movement causes a piezoelectric sensor to deliver an electric charge to a small fragment of exotics, briefly reducing mass and diminishing fall damage.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Alpha.description: A single-bit axe with 3D-printed handle and metallic head.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: While the Heike delivers a lot more wood with every strike, this lightweight power comes at the cost of swifter wear and tear.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Beta.description: An efficient, if less than durable harvesting implement.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: Shengong Inc. was founded by Sinotai in 2082 CE.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Charlie.description: A basic, but respectable felling tool.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: For a single, simple reason, handtools such as this experienced a resurgence as humanity settle worlds other than Earth: reliability.

Meta_Axe_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Axe. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Axe_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Alpha.description: A high yield, heavy mining tool from an industrial giant.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: Typically for Shengong, the Kuang\'s weight translates to power and improved results, but tends to slow and tire its users.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Beta.description: A robust and hard-bladed alloy steel mining axe.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: A tool to break the soil of many worlds.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Charlie.description: A serviceable pickaxe, with an edge for fine metal.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: Until it came to seem outdated, Shengong branded itself as \'Armorer to the Solar System\'.

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Delta.description: A basic pickaxe, robust if mass-produced.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Delta.flavorText: "A pick axe ain\'t never run outta power." - Sol Berlinski

Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Pickaxe. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Pickaxe_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Alpha.description: A heavy, powerful blade, but takes extra energy to use effectively.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: An iconic knife found wherever humanity has spread, the Qie\'s weight makes it a potent, if sometimes punishing weapon.

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: \'The knife of the family does not cut.\' ~ Proverb

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Charlie.description: A strong, if weighty close quarters weapon.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: \'A knife does not recognise its owner.\' ~ Proverb

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Delta.description: A basic but brutal straight-back skinning knife.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Delta.flavorText: A rough weapon for tough conditions - slice, skin, stab or throw the Sichou, and watch your fingers.

Meta_Knife_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Knife. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Knife_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Mushroom.description: A nutritious fungus, can be eaten raw, but best fried.
Mushroom.flavorText: The full implications of introducing fungi to a new world are yet to be seen.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Alpha.description: The Xingxing may not excel in any area, but represents unalloyed adequacy.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: No weapons are more widespread in human space than Shengong\'s.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Beta.description: Doesn\'t need to last a lifetime, to save one.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: Shengong\'s designs excel in no particular areas, but as a result have produced many classics of design economy.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Charlie.description: A decent spear that knows exactly what it is.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: Shengong is a subsidary of Asia\'s space administration, Sinotai. Its operation may be highly beauracratic, but its products are legendary for their efficiency.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Delta.description: A minor miracle of low cost production.

Meta_Spear_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Spear. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Spear_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Alpha.description: A highly economic and affordable repair hammer, like so many Shengong products.
Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: Shengong resolve the scarcity of replacement parts in space by ensuring its products share many common parts.

Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Beta.description: A highly economic and affordable design, like so many Shengong products.
Meta_Hammer_Shengong_Beta.flavorText: From hammers to space stations, Shengong Inc makes it all.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Alpha.description: An affordable, reliable and efficient bow with acceptable performance.
Meta_Bow_Shengong_Alpha.flavorText: Shengong designs are not designed to last, but rather, for ease of repair, being defined by the high degree of interchangeability of parts between their products.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Beta.description: A powerful, if not especially durable recurve design.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Charlie.flavorText: A Shengong knock-off of a classic design.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Delta.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Bow. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Bow_Shengong_Delta.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Bow_Shengong_Echo.description: A brand new take on the classic Prospector\'s Bow. The next generation of tools on Icarus.
Meta_Bow_Shengong_Echo.flavorText: Brought to you by Shengong - the Brand of the People.

Meta_Arrow_Shengong.description: Arrows of decent quality, if unremarkable performance.
Meta_Arrow_Shengong.flavorText: Shengong is the sister company of C.H.A.C., specializing in off-world equipment and weaponry.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Shengong.description: 25 arrows of decent quality, if unremarkable performance. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Shengong.flavorText: Shengong Inc. are a wholly owned subsidary of Sinotai.

Meta_Canteen_Shengong.description: A durable and economic water container.
Meta_Canteen_Shengong.flavorText: Exactly how the Hulu became such an icon of off-world existence is lost in a froth of interplanetary memes.

Meta_Oxygen_Tank_Shengong.flavorText: Named in memory of Yang Liwei.

Meta_Axe_Printed.flavorText: The MX Collective provides 90% of printing designs to the ever-expanding AM market.

Meta_Knife_Printed.description: A 3D printed metal hunting knife of no great quality.
Meta_Knife_Printed.flavorText: A staple of metallic AM printing, which has probably made its designer a small fortune in licensing fees.

Meta_Pickaxe_Printed.flavorText: The MX Collective provides a vast range of AM designs for a small licensing fee.

Meta_Spear_Printed.description: A low quality, but perfectly serviceable 3D printed spear.
Meta_Spear_Printed.flavorText: Using techniques pioneered in the early 21st century, additive manufacturing has rendered metal the new plastic.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Alpha.description: Five low-cost, metallic 3D printed arrows, spiked with poison refined from Icarus marine life. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Alpha.flavorText: If you hit, it\'s skill, if you miss, it\'s the rapidly crafted, low quality projectiles.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Beta.description: Five arrows tipped with a rapid-action nerve agent that slows targets. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Beta.flavorText: Additive manufacturing became the production process of choice following much needed advances in micro-recycling, which allowed almost any metallic compound to be processed, purified and reused as print material.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Charlie.description: Five swiftly printed metal polymer arrows with micro-barbed heads, designed to inflict more lethal wounds. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Set_Printed_Charlie.flavorText: The legality of these projectiles is currently unclear.

Meta_Arrow_Printed_Alpha.description: A box of low-cost metallic 3D printed arrows, spiked with poison refined from Icarus marine life.
Meta_Arrow_Printed_Alpha.flavorText: With the advent of widespread, domestic metallic 3D printing, modern archery entered a golden age of specialist bickering about arow design and composition.

Meta_Arrow_Printed_Beta.description: 3D printed arrows tipped with a fast-acting nerve agent that slows targets.
Meta_Arrow_Printed_Beta.flavorText: The non-lethal, but highly effective toxin skirts a number of international - and interplanetary - chemical weapons agreements.

Meta_Arrow_Printed_Charlie.description: Metallic 3D printed arrows with a micro-barbed head designed for inflicting lethal wounds.
Meta_Arrow_Printed_Charlie.flavorText: The legality of these projectiles is currently unclear.

Meta_Cot_Printed.description: Once placed in shelter, a bed can be set as a respawn location. Can also be used to sleep through the night.

Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Alpha.description: Provides temporary immunity to a range of infections commonly encountered on Icarus, including cave sickness and infected wounds.
Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Beta.description: Provides temporary immunity to a range of infections commonly encountered on Icarus, including cave sickness and infected wounds.
Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Charlie.description: Provides extended immunity to a range of infections commonly encountered on Icarus, including cave sickness and infected wounds.
Meta_Antibiotic_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Alpha.description: Temporary, heavyweight prevention against festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Beta.description: Temporary, heavyweight prevention against festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Charlie.description: Extended heavyweight prevention against festering wounds, dysentry and other parasites.
Meta_Antiparasitic_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Alpha.description: Temporarily protects againsty various Icarusian poisons.
Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Beta.description: Temporary protection againsty various Icarusian poisons.
Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Charlie.description: Extended protection againsty various Icarusian poisons.
Meta_Antipoison_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Alpha.description: A cocktail of anti-inflammatories, steroids and stimulants that temporarily protect against the effects of contusions and concussions.
Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Alpha.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Beta.description: A cocktail of anti-inflammatories, steroids and stimulants that temporarily protect against the effects of contusions and concussions.
Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Beta.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Charlie.description: A cocktail of anti-inflammatories, steroids and stimulants that temporarily protect against the effects of contusions and concussions.
Meta_Blood_Thinning_Vaccine_Charlie.flavorText: Strong but short-acting, these phage-based vaccines generally last for several days - long enough to cover most expeditions to the surface.

Mission_HighTech_1.description: A small, minutely detailed object, extremely light to hold.
Mission_HighTech_1.flavorText: Close attention reveals a faint humming, or perhaps you are imagining it.

Mission_HighTech_2.description: A clearly functional item, with no clear function.
Mission_HighTech_2.flavorText: Something about this device feels immensely old.

Mission_HighTech_3.description: An ornately manufactured device of uncertain materials.
Mission_HighTech_3.flavorText: Wherever this came from, and whoever made it, you are certain you\'ve never seen anything like it before.

Mission_HighTech_Assembled.description: A device of uncertain age, properties and origin.
Mission_HighTech_Assembled.flavorText: Something about this device just feels wrong, though whether it\'s the uncanny weight, the extraordinary intricacy, its arcane purpose, or something else, who can say?

Meta_Coal_Set.description: A collection of 100 Coal ore collected from Space. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Coal_Set.flavorText: Retrieved, processed, compressed from stellar leftovers.

Meta_Coal.description: A high density petrochemical material refined from cometary hydrocarbons.
Meta_Coal.flavorText: Comets are formed from material that never became planets, let alone stars. Burning it\'s the next best thing.

Masonry_Bench_T4.description: Powered bench for heavy stonework and carving.

Mining_Backpack.description: A reinforced backpack that greatly reduces the weight of ore and wood carried.
Mining_Backpack.flavorText: For long-distance hauling and concerted construction pushes, the triple-layer leatherwork and heavy framing greatly reduces burdens.

Meta_Campfire_Printed.description: A simple, prefabricated campfire for heat, light and cooking, designed to remain lit under all conditions.

Meta_Hammer_Printed.flavorText: Counter the forces of nature with a little violence of your own.

Meta_Sickle_Printed.description: A metallic polymer blade, increasing harvesting yield.
Meta_Sickle_Printed.flavorText: MXC is a highly successful collective focused on licensing 3D printing blueprints.

Mission_Ship_Thruster.description: A quickly repaired basic thruster made from on materials found on planet.
Mission_Ship_Thruster.flavorText: How did this work to begin with?

Mission_Ship_Thruster_Salvaged.description: A salvaged basic thruster found in some debris.
Mission_Ship_Thruster_Salvaged.flavorText: How did this work to begin with?

Mission_Ship_Navigation.description: A Navigation Module for a Ship held together with materials found on planet.

Mission_Ship_Navigation_Part.description: A few electrical parts with frayed wires.
Mission_Ship_Navigation_Part.flavorText: Can be repaired on a Machining Bench

Mission_Ship_Thruster_Part.description: The remains of what was a Ship Thruster.
Mission_Ship_Thruster_Part.flavorText: Can be repaired on a Machining Bench

Mission_Ship_Cargo.description: The ACS seem to want this pretty badly.
Mission_Ship_Cargo.flavorText: What is this? How does it work? One of lifes great mysteries...

Mammoth_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Woolly Mammoth.
Mammoth_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Mammoth_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Bravo.description: Sturdy arrows that fly mostly true

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Bravo.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight arrows. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Charlie.flavorText: Cheaply mined metal keeps costs down for Inaris

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Charlie.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight arrows. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Charlie.flavorText: Cheaply mined metal keeps costs down for Inaris

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Delta.flavorText: Inaris may not be the best, but they certainly aren\'t the worst

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Delta.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight arrows. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Delta.flavorText: Inaris may not be the best, but they certainly aren\'t the worst

Meta_Axe_Inaris_Alpha.description: An axe geared towards felling trees and chopping lumber
Meta_Axe_Inaris_Alpha.flavorText: Discovering how to mine meteors really changed the game for Inaris

Meta_Axe_Inaris_Charlie.description: A solid addition to your belt

Meta_Axe_Inaris_Delta.flavorText: Uniao owns the site of Earth\'s first space elevator

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Alpha.description: The perfect knife for hunting and skinning
Meta_Knife_Inaris_Alpha.flavorText: Inaris is partly owned by the Uniao alliance

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Bravo.flavorText: Brutal, but it gets the job done

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Charlie.description: A trusty blade to keep by your side
Meta_Knife_Inaris_Charlie.flavorText: Perfect for hurling at your enemies

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Delta.description: The perfect knife to hone your skills with

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Alpha.description: A heavy tool to mine with off-world

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Bravo.description: A metal base gives this mining axe great grip
Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Bravo.flavorText: Mining is where all began for Inaris

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Charlie.description: A base model that performs well

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Delta.description: A sturdy pickaxe that gets the job done
Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Delta.flavorText: Perfect for mining, or scaring away that pesky wildlife

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Alpha.description: Slow your foes with this hunting spear

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Bravo.description: A sturdily built spear with excellent grip

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Charlie.description: A well made spear that\'s also lightweight
Meta_Spear_Inaris_Charlie.flavorText: Inaris are central players in the off-world mining industry

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Delta.description: A reliable addition to your arsenal
Meta_Spear_Inaris_Delta.flavorText: Keep your weapons by your side, you\'ll never know when you\'ll need them

Meta_Furnace_Printed.description: A premade furnace for all of your basic smelting needs
Meta_Furnace_Printed.flavorText: Basic but gets the job done

Meta_Crate_Printed.description: A premade crate to store your supplies

Meta_Arrow_Set_Inaris_Alpha.description: 25 good value arrows, nothing less. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Corn_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Corn Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Pumpkin_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Pumpkin Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Squash_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Squash Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Carrot_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Carrot Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Mushroom_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Mushroom Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Berry_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Berry Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Watermelon_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Watermelon Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Wheat_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Wheat Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Bean_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Bean Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Module_Animal_Healthbar.description: A fast way to view the health of your prey, or your enemies
Meta_Module_Animal_Healthbar.flavorText: Remember to keep an eye on your own health bar too

Meta_Module_Animal_Highlighting.description: A quicker way to track your prey

Mission_Laser_Part_1.description: The base for a high-powered heating device
Mission_Laser_Part_1.flavorText: An excellent example of sturdy construction

Mission_Laser_Part_2.description: The arm for a high-powered heating device
Mission_Laser_Part_2.flavorText: Keep fingers and toes clear from all moving parts

Mission_Laser_Part_3.description: The laser for a high-powered heating device

Mission_Broken_Solar_Panel.description: Could be repaired with a bit of patience
Mission_Broken_Solar_Panel.flavorText: A lot of simple devices can be repaired on Icarus

Meta_Axe_Larkwell.description: A well-honed, but less durable axe.
Meta_Axe_Larkwell.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez is an old US-based industrial conglomerate with strong presence in off-world infrastructure.

Meta_Pickaxe_Larkwell.flavorText: One of Larkwell Martinez\'s flagship products.

Meta_Hammer_Larkwell.description: A well made, mid-range repair hammer.

Meta_Sickle_Larkwell.description: A mid-range sickle, perfect for gathering.
Meta_Sickle_Larkwell.flavorText: If it ain\'t broken, why fix it?

Meta_Knife_Larkwell.description: A keen blade, honed to perfection.
Meta_Knife_Larkwell.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez is well-known as a manufacturer of hard-hitting weapons.

Meta_Spear_Larkwell.description: A tough and deadly multi-purpose weapon.
Meta_Spear_Larkwell.flavorText: The LM brand has a very enthusiastic user base for its products.

Meta_Arrow_Larkwell_Standard.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez used to be a very reliable brand, but recent cost-cutting has somewhat reduced their quality.

Meta_Arrow_Larkwell_Ballistic.description: An arrow that explodes on impact in addition to the damage from the initial hit.

Meta_Arrow_Larkwell_Bleed.description: A barbed arrow that causes bleeding, lasting 30s and dealing 3-7 damage per second.

Meta_Arrow_Larkwell_Tazer.description: An arrow that can slow it\'s target for 4s, dealing 40-120 damage over that time period. The stronger the target, the more likely it is to resist the effects.
Meta_Arrow_Larkwell_Tazer.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez was once the largest weapon supplier in America.

Meta_Bolt_Larkwell_Standard.description: A standard bolt from a trusted brand.
Meta_Bolt_Larkwell_Standard.flavorText: Designed specifically for your trusty crossbow.

Meta_Scanner_DeepOre.description: A scanner that can be programmed to locate specific deep ore deposits within the surrounding area
Meta_Scanner_DeepOre.flavorText: The best that money can buy.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Scanner.description: A device designed to monitor the effects of Abyssal Oxite on organic life.
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Scanner.flavorText: The things we do for Ren.

Meta_Bow_Larkwell.flavorText: For moments when remaining stealth is paramount.

Mission_Ship_Gyro.flavorText: This is just what this ship needs to get back home.

Mission_Ship_Gyro_Broken.description: This instrument has been damaged almost beyond repair.
Mission_Ship_Gyro_Broken.flavorText: What could have broken this so badly?

Meta_Carbon_Head_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Head_Alpha.flavorText: One of the many triumphs of human engineering.

Meta_Carbon_Chest_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Chest_Alpha.flavorText: Disclaimer: Processed in a factory that also handles radioactive material.

Meta_Carbon_Arms_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Arms_Alpha.flavorText: Please report any unusal side effects to your local UDA office.

Meta_Carbon_Legs_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Legs_Alpha.flavorText: These armor pieces are made of the latest [REDACTED] materials.

Meta_Carbon_Feet_Alpha.description: A lightweight piece of armor designed with stealth and movement in mind.
Meta_Carbon_Feet_Alpha.flavorText: Some users may notice a mild tingling sensation when wearing these boots for an extended period.

Meta_Carbon_Head_Beta.description: The latest technology, designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Head_Beta.flavorText: The perfect companion for any aspiring miner or lumberjack.

Meta_Carbon_Chest_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.

Meta_Carbon_Arms_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Arms_Beta.flavorText: You\'ll find you can lift more with this set.

Meta_Carbon_Legs_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Legs_Beta.flavorText: Never skip leg day, unless you have these to help.

Meta_Carbon_Feet_Beta.description: The latest technology designed to assist with mining and felling.
Meta_Carbon_Feet_Beta.flavorText: The toughest boots on the orbital market.

Meta_Backpack_Larkwell_Alpha.description: Provides excellent utilities for those who prefer a shotgun to a bow.
Meta_Backpack_Larkwell_Alpha.flavorText: Larkwell Martinez have been well known earthside since before Icarus was even discovered.

Meta_Backpack_Larkwell_Beta.description: Provides a huge boost to your storage capacity.
Meta_Backpack_Larkwell_Beta.flavorText: How many pockets can a backpack have? Larkwell Martinez provide the answer.

Meta_Module_Alpha.description: Enables prospectors near you to carry more weight. Buff does not apply to the wearer.

Meta_Module_Beta.description: Enables prospectors near you to heal from afflictions faster. Buff does not apply to the wearer.

Meta_Repair_Item.description: A kit that can repair most workshop items at a Repair Bench.
Meta_Repair_Item.flavorText: If you break it, buy this.

Meta_Repair_Item_Pack.description: Use to collect 5x Workshop Repair Kits that can repair most Workshop Items at a Repair Bench.
Meta_Repair_Item_Pack.flavorText: For the clumsy prospector on the go.

Mission_Explosive.description: An explosive device provided by the UDA for special operations.

Mission_Prototype_Laser.description: The result of a makeshift repair.

Mission_Broken_Prototype_Laser.description: Broken prototype laser, it could be repaired at a crafting bench.
Mission_Broken_Prototype_Laser.flavorText: Once a cutting edge prototype, now a pile of scrap.

Meta_Power_Source.description: Used to power the IC-001 Extractor. Single use. Cannot be returned to Station.
Meta_Power_Source.flavorText: WARNING: Handle with care, contains unstable material.

Mission_Knife_Lion.description: Exotic infused blade, good for gathering rare meat
Mission_Knife_Lion.flavorText: Sharp with a faint purple glow.

Meta_Module_WorldBoss.description: Provides realtime location data on World Bosses
Meta_Module_WorldBoss.flavorText: Equip in a module slot to view your world bosses on the map.

Mission_Analyzer_Egg.description: Scans and locates nearby organic matter of the same type.
Mission_Analyzer_Egg.flavorText: Another machine designed by a scientist who has never stepped foot on Icarus.

Mission_CaveWormEgg.description: An egg snatched from a caveworm nest.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Larkwell_Standard.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight arrows. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Standard.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight bolts. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Larkwell_Ballistic.description: A set of 25 arrows that explode on impact in addition to the damage from the initial hit. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Larkwell_Bleed.description: A set of 25 barbed arrows that cause bleeding, lasting 30s and dealing 3-7 damage per second. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Arrow_Set_Larkwell_Tazer.description: A set of 25 arrows that can slow its target for 4s, dealing 40-120 damage over that time period. The stronger the target, the more likely it is to resist the effects. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Mission_Delivery_Crystal.flavorText: This crystal seems to be a perfect candidate for large scale map resonance

Mission_Prototype_Battery.flavorText: Strangely heavy for its size, the low hum it emits is slightly unnerving

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Abyssal_Oxite.description: A unstable form of Oxite found deep underground
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Abyssal_Oxite.flavorText: You feel a weird burning sensation..

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Containment.flavorText: Preventing mortal injury to prospectors is good for the bottom line.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Catalyst.description: A catalyst to stabilize volatile materials.
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Catalyst.flavorText: Making it a little safer to handle certain raw materials.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_BombParts.description: A control system for an environmental monitoring device.
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_BombParts.flavorText: Some circuitry, a little tape, good as new.

Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Bomb.description: A device used for monitoring the nearby environment.
Mission_STYX_D_Research2_Bomb.flavorText: A hospitable terraspace was the goal..

Mission_Power_Source.description: A state of the art Power Cell for a Biological Containment Unit.
Mission_Power_Source.flavorText: This is making a very weird humming noise.

Mission_Empty_Enzyme_Container.description: A container which used to hold stable Enzymes
Mission_Empty_Enzyme_Container.flavorText: Not a trace of enzymes remain.

Mission_Full_Enzyme_Container.description: A container full of partially digested Enzymes.

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_A.description: A high powered Crossbow that\'s quick to reload.

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_B.description: The heavy draw on this weapon causes a slower reload, but adds far more damage.
Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_B.flavorText: Be careful where you point that thing.

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_C.description: A reliable crossbow to give you an edge in combat.
Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_C.flavorText: Hated by bears all over Icarus.

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_D.flavorText: This should give you an edge against the wildlife.

Metal_Sledgehammer.description: Very heavy weapon that can be used to break rocks like Scoria and Obsidian.
Metal_Sledgehammer.flavorText: Can deal a lot of damage

Mission_Communication_Device_T2.description: Interact to Receive a Mission From \'SMPL3\' - Simplified Mission Prospector Liaison V3
Mission_Communication_Device_T2.flavorText: Replacing UDA agents one mission at a time.

Mission_Communication_Device_T3.description: An upgrade for the C0NT4CT Device that will allow access to encoded missions.

Mission_Communication_Device_T4.description: An upgrade for the C0NT4CT Device that will allow access to encrypted missions.

Mission_Flora_Biomatter_Sample.description: A sample taken from a poisonous plant

Mission_Digested_Biomatter_Sample.description: A sample taken from a contaminated bear.
Mission_Digested_Biomatter_Sample.flavorText: Its essentially some kind of Acid

Mission_Damaged_Bioweapon_Sample.description: A damaged bio-weapon, it seems to be leaking.
Mission_Damaged_Bioweapon_Sample.flavorText: Probably get rid of this ASAP

Mission_Communication_Blueprint_T2.description: A USB drive with the plans for an Upgraded Communication Device
Mission_Communication_Blueprint_T2.flavorText: Once downloaded to the suit, there is no need for this item.

Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_1.description: A Strange Audio log taken from a prospectors suit.

Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_2.description: A Strange Audio log taken from a prospectors suit.

Metal_Throwing_Knife.description: A short, clip-point blade for better defense and swifter skinning.
Metal_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: \'A mind all logic is like a knife all blade. It makes the hand bleed that uses it.\' -- Rabindranath Tagore

Metal_Throwing_Spear.description: An iron spearhead, improving defensive power and range.
Metal_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: \'I throw a spear into the darkness. That is intuition. Then I must send an army into the darkness to find the spear. That is intellect.\' -- Ingmar Bergman

Mixed_Berries.description: A tasty combination of berries to keep you going.
Mixed_Berries.flavorText: Another great meal from your Cooking Station.

Meta_Avocado_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Avocado Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Rhubarb_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Rhubarb Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Kumara_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Kumara Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Strawberry_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Strawberry Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Fishfinder.description: Fish Identification and Scanning Hardware. A handheld device that scans the waterbodies at the present location for fish like creatures.

Meta_Bolt_Larkwell_Electroshock.description: A bolt from a trusted brand that delivers a hefty electrical shock on impact.
Meta_Bolt_Larkwell_Electroshock.flavorText: Designed specifically for your trusty crossbow.

Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Electroshock.description: A set of 25 well engineered, charged bolts. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Electroshock.flavorText: A great product for a great price. Because Larkwell cares.

Meta_Bolt_Larkwell_Explosive.description: A bolt from a trusted brand that explodes on impact.
Meta_Bolt_Larkwell_Explosive.flavorText: Designed specifically for your trusty crossbow.

Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Explosive.description: A set of 25 well engineered, explosive bolts. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Explosive.flavorText: A great product for a great price. Because Larkwell cares.

Meta_Bolt_Larkwell_Piercing.description: A bolt from a trusted brand that easily pierces through most materials on impact.
Meta_Bolt_Larkwell_Piercing.flavorText: Designed specifically for your trusty crossbow.

Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Piercing.description: A set of 25 well engineered, piercing bolts. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Bolt_Set_Larkwell_Piercing.flavorText: A great product for a great price. Because Larkwell cares.

Meta_Module_Temperature.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit in regulating minor temperature fluctuations.
Meta_Module_Temperature.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_Caving.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit in protecting you from threats found in the cave systems of Icarus.
Meta_Module_Caving.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_Extremes.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit in regulating your temperature in extreme environments.
Meta_Module_Extremes.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_Fishing.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit in locating a greater variety of aquatic life in the waterways of Icarus.
Meta_Module_Fishing.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_Wounds.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit with extra layers of protection against flesh wounds.
Meta_Module_Wounds.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Module_Taming.description: A handy module that assists your envirosuit with pheromones to encourage the best from your tamed creatures.
Meta_Module_Taming.flavorText: Warning: Prototype tech listed off-label for use in Icarus operations. Warranty void if used planetside. Use at your own risk.

Meta_Heated_Canteen_Larkwell.description: An advanced canteen that can be used to heat and store water at your desired temperature.
Meta_Heated_Canteen_Larkwell.flavorText: Because there\'s nothing better than a hot drink in the Arctic.

Meta_Oxygen_Tank_Larkwell.description: An advanced oxygen tank with brand-new filters to improve vigor and air quality planetside.
Meta_Oxygen_Tank_Larkwell.flavorText: A true breath of fresh air.

Meta_Creature_Scanner.description: Bio-Entity Analysis and Scanning Technology. A handheld device that scans nearby creatures for analysis and locates weaknesses.
Meta_Creature_Scanner.flavorText: A beauty of a device that will make surviving Icarus that much easier.

Mission_Tomato.description: A tomato spliced with the genes of a goat for surviving harsh climates.
Mission_Tomato.flavorText: Classed as a fruit, not a vegetable.

Mission_Prototype_Printed_Crate.description: A 3D Printed Crate with an internal battery for keeping contents preserved.

Masonry_Bench_T3.description: A manual workspace for detailed stonework and crafting.
Masonry_Bench_T3.flavorText: The skill and precision of a mason can never be replaced by machines...

Meta_Reed_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Reed Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Yeast_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Yeast Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Lily_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Lily Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Cocao_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Cocoa Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming.

Meta_Coffee_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Coffee Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_GreenTea_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Tea Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_WildTea_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Gorse Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Fiber_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Fiber Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Tomato_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Tomato Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Potato_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Potato Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Resource_Pack_Wood.description: A collection of 250 Wood collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Wood.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Stone.description: A collection of 250 Stone collected by another prospector for you.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Stone.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Silica.description: A collection of 100 Silica Ore collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Silica.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Oxite.description: A collection of 100 Oxite Ore collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Oxite.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Sulfur.description: A collection of 100 Sulfur collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Sulfur.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Iron.description: A collection of 100 Iron collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Iron.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Copper.description: A collection of 100 Copper collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Copper.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Gold.description: A collection of 100 Gold ore collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Gold.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Aluminium.description: A collection of 100 Aluminium ore collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Aluminium.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Platinum.description: A collection of 100 Platinum ore collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Platinum.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Titanium.description: A collection of 100 Titanium ore collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Titanium.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Medic_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to cover all your medical needs.

Moa_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Moa.
Moa_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Mission_Device.description: Certified Online Network Transmitter for Contractor Tasking. Allows contact to Orbital station SMPL3 Missions and Operations.
Mission_Device.flavorText: Replacing UDA agents one mission at a time.

Moa_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Metal_Table_Round.description: A sleek and minimalist round metal table.
Metal_Table_Round.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Table_Dining6.description: A sleek and minimalist metal table.
Metal_Table_Dining6.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Table_Dining10.description: A sleek and minimalist metal dining table.
Metal_Table_Dining10.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Living.description: A sleek and minimalist metal chair.
Metal_Chair_Living.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Living_2Seater.description: A sleek and minimalist metal two seater couch.
Metal_Chair_Living_2Seater.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Sitting.description: A sleek and minimalist metal bench.
Metal_Chair_Sitting.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Dining.description: A sleek and minimalist metal dining chair.
Metal_Chair_Dining.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Shelf_Wall.description: A sleek and minimalist metal wall shelf.
Metal_Shelf_Wall.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Display_Cabinet.description: A sleek and minimalist metal display cabinet.
Metal_Display_Cabinet.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Wardrobe.description: A sleek and minimalist metal wardrobe.
Metal_Wardrobe.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Candle.description: A sleek and minimalist metal candlestick.
Metal_Candle.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Dresser.description: A sleek and minimalist metal dresser.
Metal_Dresser.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Stool.description: A sleek and minimalist metal stool.
Metal_Stool.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Nightstand.description: A sleek and minimalist metal nightstand.
Metal_Nightstand.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Bookshelf.description: A sleek and minimalist metal bookshelf.
Metal_Bookshelf.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Lamp.description: A sleek and minimalist metal lamp.
Metal_Lamp.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Coffeetable.description: A sleek and minimalist metal coffee table.
Metal_Coffeetable.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Bed.description: A sleek and minimalist metal bed.
Metal_Bed.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Sandworm.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with temperature regulation.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Sandworm.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_AlphaWolf.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with health and stamina regulation.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_AlphaWolf.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Scorpion.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist with surviving a wildlife attack.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Scorpion.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_IceMammoth.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with temperature regulation.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_IceMammoth.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_00.description: A sickle designed for reaping as many seeds as possible.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_01.description: A sickle infused with distilled miasmic coating to provide bonuses when harvesting.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_02.description: A sickle which emits heats thanks to its obsidian core.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_03.description: A sickle that is kept frosty due to the research into super cooled ice.

Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_3.description: An audio log left behind by someone.
Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_3.flavorText: Could this hold the information you\'ve been searching for?

Meta_SugarCane_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Sugar Cane Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Coconut_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Coconut Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Bramble_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Bramble Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_4.description: An audio log left behind by someone.
Mission_AudioLog_Prometheus_4.flavorText: Could this hold the information you\'ve been searching for?

Mushroom_Omlette.description: Fried egg with a generous helping of mushrooms.

Mission_Incubator.description: A device designed to replicate various atmospheres to allow for optimal egg growth for multiple creatures.
Mission_Incubator.flavorText: Are we seriously hatching creatures now?

MiniHippo_Egg.description: A strange egg with movement inside, it must be close to hatching.

Medicine_Bench.description: Used for creating tonics, pills and other medicines.

Meta_Kiwi_Fruit_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Kiwi Fruit Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Mission_Kiwi_Egg.description: A Kiwi egg that has been genetically modified to withstand the harsh Icarus environment.
Mission_Kiwi_Egg.flavorText: I wonder if these would taste good?

Mission_Monitoring_Pylon.description: A pylon designed for monitoring nearby wildlife.

Mission_Aerosol_Emitter.description: A device for emitting an aerosol solution.

Mission_Liquid_Deployment.description: A liquid solution, simple to deploy, just dump on the ground.

Meta_Module_Food.description: A Module for greatly reducing food consumption.

Meta_Module_Oxygen.description: A Module for greatly reducing oxygen consumption.

Meta_Module_Water.description: A Module for greatly reducing water consumption.

Meta_Module_TamedDamage.description: A Module for greatly increasing tamed creature damage

Meta_Module_Melee.description: A Module for greatly increasing melee damage, and reducing melee damage taken

Meta_Module_HeatResist.description: A Module for greatly increasing heat resistance.

Meta_Module_ColdResist.description: A Module for greatly increasing cold resistance.

Meta_Module_ExposureResist.description: A Module for greatly increasing exposure resistance.

Meta_Module_ItemWear.description: A Module for greatly reducing item wear and tear.

Meta_Module_Night.description: A Module for greatly increasing night movement speed and reducing food consumption at night

Meta_Module_Highlight.description: A Module for highlighting any projectile

Meta_Module_StaminaRegen.description: A Module for greatly increasing stamina regeneration.

Mini_Hippo_Trophy.description: Three mounted Dribbos, mounted for all to see.
Mini_Hippo_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Mini_Hippo_Head.description: A preserved memory of a unique creature.
Mini_Hippo_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Manufacturer.description: Upgrades your manufacturing abilities with industrial equipment.

Mission_Medical_Device.description: Health Examination & Analysis Lens. Hold to scan prospectors and see their ailments.
Mission_Medical_Device.flavorText: XIGO\'s latest innovation for the furtherment of medical technolgies.

Mission_Alternator.description: A makeshift alternator made on planet for repairing a mining truck.

Mission_Radiator.description: A makeshift radiator made on planet for repairing a mining truck.
Mission_Radiator.flavorText: Not a traditional looking radiator but it will do the job.

Medic_Cabinet.description: A wall mounted medical cabinet, perfect for storing medicine.

Mission_Stasis_Bag.description: A bag inlaid with technology that puts the user into a chemical stasis for later treatment.
Mission_Stasis_Bag.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_NPC_4.description: Simmons is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_NPC_4.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_NPC_5.description: Washington is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_NPC_5.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Milk_Bottle_Glass.description: A glass bottle made for storing milk. Milk will not spoil.
Milk_Bottle_Glass.flavorText: Milk was considered \'food of the gods\' in ancient cultures.

Milk_Bucket.description: A steel pail made for storing milk. Milk will spoil and the Pail will empty when this occurs.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_LavaHunter.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with molten magma.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_LavaHunter.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Hammerhead.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals, assists with gathering ore.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_Hammerhead.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_RockGolem.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist your body with cave tolerance, and grants additional stone
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_RockGolem.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_SwampApe.description: An inhaler that delivers a concentrated dose of UDA-approved chemicals which may assist gathering infected bark.
Meta_Biolab_Inhaler_SwampApe.flavorText: Ah, the wonders of modern medicine.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Dirt.description: A collection of 50 Dirt collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Dirt.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Scoria.description: A collection of 100 Scoria collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Scoria.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Obsidian.description: A collection of 100 Obsidian collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Obsidian.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Clay.description: A collection of 100 Clay collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Clay.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Mission_Radio.description: Contacts a nearby C0NT4CT Device to kick off Operations on the go. Will not work if there is no C0NT4CT device placed on the map.
Mission_Radio.flavorText: A truly remarkable piece of equipment.

MakeshiftRadio.description: A makeshift radio for basic offworld communication.

Mission_Organic_Analyzer.description: A device which will Analyze Organic Samples.

Mission_Seismic_Probe.description: After a brief scan this will point towards the source of unnatural vibrations.
Mission_Seismic_Probe.flavorText: This looks cobbled together, someone is cutting some corners.

Mission_Explosive_Crafted.description: An explosive device crafted on Icarus.

Mission_MammothBioSample.description: A collection of biomatter from a Mammoth experiment.

Mission_Neurotoxic_Aerosol.description: A small canister of an aerosol which will tranquilize any creature in the surrounding area, primed for manual delivery.
Mission_Neurotoxic_Aerosol.flavorText: Can be deadly in the wrong hands.

Mission_Generator_NoDestroy.description: An efficient, if basic biofuel-driven electric generator.
Mission_Generator_NoDestroy.flavorText: Literally or figuratively, we\'ve come a long way from the Faraday Disc.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Synthetic_Enzymes.description: A collection of 100 Synthetic collected by another prospector for you. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Resource_Pack_Synthetic_Enzymes.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.

Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_IM_Researcher2.description: Felix is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_IM_Researcher2.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Mission_Enzyme_Propogation_Unit.description: A device which disperses a modified terraforming enzyme into the surrounding environment for creature experimentation

Mission_Enzyme_Propogation_Unit_Craftabl.description: A device which disperses a modified terraforming enzyme into the surrounding environment for creature experimentation

Mission_Enzyme_Propogation_Hub.description: A device which disperses a modified terraforming enzyme into the surrounding environment for creature experimentation

Mission_Biotag.description: A small device which monitors biometrics of the creature it is implanted into.

Mission_Vesper_Cage.description: Can trap small creatures such as Vespers.

Meta_Banana_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Banana Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Mission_Biochip_A.description: A small device which monitors biometrics of the creature it is implanted into.

Mission_Biochip_B.description: A small device which monitors biometrics of the creature it is implanted into.

Mission_Biochip_C.description: A small device which monitors biometrics of the creature it is implanted into.

Mission_Shackles.description: Rusted and Worn Shackles, these have been used before.

Mission_DNA_Scalpel.description: A very sharp implement for cutting through flesh.

Mission_DNA_TissueSample.description: A Tissue Sample Expertly removed with a Scalpel.

Mission_DNA_HomogenizedSample.description: Ground up sample of Garganutan tissue.

Mission_DNA_MixedBufferSolution.description: The result of mixing a sample with Tris-EDTA Buffer.

Mission_DNA_Lysate.description: The Result of Combining the Mixed Buffer Solution Correctly.

Mission_DNA_Heated_Lysate.description: Heated facilitating in the process of protein denaturation.

Mission_DNA_Supernatant.description: Result of Separating components of a Lysate solution.

Mission_DNA_Precipitated.description: Result of combining Ethanol with the Supernatant Solution.

Mission_DNA_Pellet.description: The Result of Separating Precipitated DNA in a Centrifuge.

Mission_DNA_Sample.description: A Stable Sample of Garganutan DNA ready for Transport.
Mission_DNA_Sample.flavorText: You could have worked in a lab.

Mission_DNA_Ruined.description: Result of a Failed DNA Extraction

Mission_Burner.description: A simple tool for heating solutions.
Mission_Burner.flavorText: Wouldn\'t find a chemistry lab without one of these.

Mission_Examination_Table.description: A Table for Speciments to be Placed and Examined.

Mission_Poison_Lair_Sample.description: A Sample of the Poison that was being secreted from a Garganutan Lair.

MinerArmor_Head.description: Specialised Armor Designed Specifically for Survival and Resource Retrieval in the Caves of Icarus.

MinerArmor_Chest.description: Specialised Armor Designed Specifically for Survival and Resource Retrieval in the Caves of Icarus.

MinerArmor_Arms.description: Specialised Armor Designed Specifically for Survival and Resource Retrieval in the Caves of Icarus.

MinerArmor_Legs.description: Specialised Armor Designed Specifically for Survival and Resource Retrieval in the Caves of Icarus.

MinerArmor_Feet.description: Specialised Armor Designed Specifically for Survival and Resource Retrieval in the Caves of Icarus.

Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC1.description: Voss is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC1.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC2.description: Harken is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC2.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC3.description: Biggs is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC3.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC4.description: Wedge is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported off planet.
Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_RG_NPC4.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Mining_Laser.description: A high-energy cutting beam engineered to vaporize rock and expose valuable ore with precision.
Mining_Laser.flavorText: Point, fire, and let physics do the heavy lifting.

Mission_TPS_Communication_Tower.description: Intercepting Communication Signals within the Area

Meta_Onion_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Onion Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Agave_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Agave Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_PricklyPear_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Prickly Pear Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Garlic_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Garlic Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Truffle_Seed.description: Right click to open a packet of Truffle Seeds that have been stabilised for off-world farming

Meta_Module_Radiation.description: Provides some basic Radiation Protection to your Envirosuit.
Meta_Module_Radiation.flavorText: Can be equipped in a module slot.

Mission_ELY3_AccessCard.description: A Battered Access Card to LAB-01 - Door Code [52201]
Mission_ELY3_AccessCard.flavorText: The UDA Employee won\'t miss it.

Mission_Device_EDEN.description: Certified Online Network Transmitter for Contractor Tasking. Allows contact to Orbital station SMPL3 Missions and Operations.
Mission_Device_EDEN.flavorText: Replacing UDA agents one mission at a time.

Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_Iris.description: Iris is frozen in a medically induced stasis ready to be transported to safety.
Mission_Stasis_Bag_Full_Iris.flavorText: Another XIGO product that is at the bleeding edge of medical technology.

Mange_Wolf_Head.description: A preserved memory of a radioactive beast.
Mange_Wolf_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Mange_Wolf_Alpha_Head.description: A preserved memory of a radioactive beast.
Mange_Wolf_Alpha_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

MonkeyStick.description: Small branches, easily fashioned into basic tools.
MonkeyStick.flavorText: Whether making weapons or tools, a crafting bench or fuel, basic creation begins with the humble stick.

Mange_Wolf_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Skulmutt.
Mange_Wolf_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Mange_Wolf_Alpha_Trophy.description: The mounted remains of a Skulmutt Prime.
Mange_Wolf_Alpha_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Mission_Drone_Navigation.description: A navigation computuer core, custom made for a heavy duty drone.
Mission_Drone_Navigation.flavorText: A drone can\'t go anywhere without navigation.

Mission_Drone_Rotor.description: A sturdy rotor which helps generate lift for a heavy duty transport drone.
Mission_Drone_Rotor.flavorText: A drone can\'t go anywhere without lift.

Meta_Resource_Pack_Limestone.flavorText: These supplies are ethically provided by contractors who were found to be in breach of precept 45-379b, this is enforced by Group 15 and its subsidiaries.
